title: Phase 1D: API middleware (auth, RBAC, rate-limit, error, pagination, validation, scope)
description: Build all API middleware: auth middleware (session/JWT validation), RBAC middleware (role + permission checks), rate limiting, standard error handling, pagination helper, Zod validation wrapper, and scope filtering helper.
steps: Create src/lib/middleware/auth.ts with session check and JWT validation middleware
Create src/lib/middleware/rbac.ts with role and permission check middleware (composable)
Create src/lib/middleware/rate-limit.ts with Redis-backed rate limiting
Create src/lib/middleware/error-handler.ts with standard error format ({error, message, details, statusCode})
Create src/lib/middleware/pagination.ts with cursor and offset pagination helpers
Create src/lib/middleware/validate.ts with Zod schema validation wrapper for request body/query/params
Create src/lib/middleware/scope-filter.ts with automatic Prisma where-clause injection based on user scope
